name: Chicken and Dumpling Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onion, celery, and garlic in butter until tender.
2. Add flour, sugar, salt, basil, pepper, and broth; bring to a boil.
3. Cook and stir for one minute. Reduce heat.
4. Add peas and cook for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in cubed chicken.
6. Pour mixture into a greased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking dish.
7. For dumplings, combine biscuit mix and basil in a bowl.
8. Stir milk with a fork until moistened; drop by tablespoonfuls onto casserole (12 dumplings).
9. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30 minutes.
10. Cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until dumplings are done.
